markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 503. Dealer's & Mfr.'s Vehicle License Plates
##### § 503.012 — Collected Money

Section 403.095 (Use of Dedicated Revenue) , Government Code, does not apply to money received by the department and deposited to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund in accordance with this chapter.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1287 (H.B.2202), Sec. 30, eff. September 1, 2013.*

subsections.text: Section 403.095 (Use of Dedicated Revenue) , Government Code, does not apply to money received by the department and deposited to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund in accordance with this chapter.
